mapper.select:
SELECT r.seq, r.member_name AS memberName, r.phone_number AS phoneNumber, r.membership_name AS membershipName, r.price, r.reason, r.status, r.reject_reason AS rejectReason, r.created_date AS createdDate, mm.start_date AS startDate, mm.expiry_date AS expiryDate, mm.total_count AS totalCount, mm.used_count AS usedCount, mm.postpone_used AS postponeUsed FROM complex_refund_requests r LEFT JOIN complex_member_memberships mm ON mm.seq = r.member_membership_seq
ORDER BY r.created_date DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
